metadata.title: Jumix — Digital platform for crane services
metadata.description: Manage cranes, sites and operators in a single system. Shift geolocation, automated payroll, marketplace for crane operators — built for construction companies in Kazakhstan.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Jumix — digital platform for crane services
metadata.privacyDescription: Personal data processing policy for users of the Jumix platform.
metadata.termsDescription: Terms of use of the Jumix platform for construction companies and crane operators.

hero.title: Manage cranes, sites and operators in a single system
hero.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no paperwork. A transparent digital ecosystem for construction companies and crane operators across Kazakhstan.
hero.trustLine: Shift geolocation · Automated payroll · Operator marketplace

painPoints.title: What's holding your business back
painPoints.subtitle: Four problems that slow construction companies and crane operators down every day.

items.title: Chaos in shift management
items.description: Excel sheets, phone calls, lost data on crane and operator activity.

items.title: Disputes about hours worked
items.description: There's no reliable way to verify who was on site and how many hours they worked.

items.title: Slow replacements
items.description: An operator doesn't show up — the site is idle, and finding a replacement through contacts takes hours.

items.title: Opaque payroll
items.description: Manual salary calculations with errors, conflicts between owners and operators.

forCompanies.title: Jumix for construction companies
forCompanies.subtitle: Control, savings and transparency at every stage of the work.

items.title: Full control of sites and equipment
items.description: Manage all cranes, sites and crane operators from a single dashboard.

items.title: Geolocation and shift control
items.description: See who's actually on site, when the shift started and how many hours have been worked.

items.title: Automated payroll
items.description: Timesheets, payouts, overtime — calculated automatically without errors.

items.title: Fast staff replacement
items.description: Operator didn't show up? Find a replacement in minutes through the built-in marketplace.

items.title: Rating system
items.description: Work only with verified specialists who have a strong reputation.

items.title: Analytics and reports
items.description: Understand the real costs and efficiency of every site.

forCompanies.outcome: Lower costs, less manual work, and full control over your processes.

forOperators.title: Jumix for crane operators
forOperators.subtitle: More work, transparent income, fair shift tracking.

items.title: Simple mobile app
items.description: Start and end your shift with a single tap.

items.title: Transparent earnings
items.description: Always see how much you've earned and which shifts it's for.

items.title: Work confirmed without disputes
items.description: Geolocation records your presence on site.

items.title: Access to new jobs
items.description: List yourself in the marketplace and receive offers from companies.

items.title: Personal rating
items.description: The higher your rating — the more orders and the higher your income.

items.title: Feedback and safety
items.description: Report equipment issues directly through the app.

forOperators.outcome: Steady employment, fair pay and growing income.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from sign-up to fully automated shift tracking.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.description: The company creates an account and invites crane operators. Operators sign up through the mobile app.

steps.title: Assign sites
steps.description: The company adds sites with geofence boundaries. Operators get access to start working.

steps.title: Digital shift tracking
steps.description: Every shift is recorded automatically. Geolocation confirms presence, hours are calculated without errors.

whyJumix.title: The platform that's building a new industry
whyJumix.subtitle: Five reasons why companies and crane operators choose Jumix.

items.title: Fully digital workflow
items.description: No Excel, no paperwork, no lost data. Everything in one system.

items.title: Transparency for everyone
items.description: Companies see actual hours worked. Operators see fair payouts. Disputes are eliminated.

items.title: 2–3× faster operations
items.description: Finding replacements, calculating payroll, tracking shifts — what used to take hours now takes minutes.

items.title: Fewer errors
items.description: Automation removes the human factor from critical calculations.

items.title: Single industry platform
items.description: We're building a marketplace where companies find reliable specialists and crane operators get steady work.

finalCta.title: Roll out Jumix at your company
finalCta.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp — we'll walk you through the platform, give you a demo and help you onboard.

surveys.title: Tell us about your work
surveys.subtitle: We're researching the crane services market and rely on your experience. Your answers will help us build a truly useful tool.

forCompanies.title: Survey for companies
forCompanies.description: For crane owners and construction company managers. Tell us how you currently manage cranes and crane operators.

forOperators.title: Survey for crane operators
forOperators.description: For crane operators. Tell us about your work, pay and documents. How it is today and how it could be better.

footer.tagline: Digital platform for crane services in Kazakhstan

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Jumix LLP (hereinafter — the "Operator") processes personal data of users of the Jumix platform (jumix.kz, app.jumix.kz, mobile application) in accordance with the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On Personal Data and its Protection".
privacy.section1Body: We collect: first and last name, IIN (individual identification number), phone number, driver/crane operator license details, photos of licenses, geolocation data during work shifts, photos and descriptions of incidents. For companies — legal entity details, BIN (business identification number), and contact details of authorized persons.
privacy.section2Body: User identification, verification of crane operators' professional qualifications, recording of work shifts, payroll calculation, ensuring safety on sites, resolving disputes between parties, and complying with legal requirements.
privacy.section3Body: We do not disclose personal data to third parties, except: (a) to the crane operator's employer company — data on professional qualifications and shifts worked; (b) to authorized state authorities upon request; (c) to technical contractors (hosting, SMS provider) — to the extent necessary to provide services, under non-disclosure agreements.
privacy.section4Body: Data is retained for the duration of the account and for 5 years after deletion for accounting and tax purposes. Geolocation records are retained for 12 months and then anonymized.
privacy.section5Body: You have the right to: receive information about the processing of your data, request its modification or deletion, and withdraw consent to processing. Send requests to info@jumix.kz.
privacy.section6Body: We apply technical and organizational protection measures: encryption in transit (TLS), storing passwords as hashes, restricting access to data on a least-privilege basis, and regular backups.
privacy.section7Body: The Operator may amend this Policy. The current version is published at jumix.kz/privacy. Material changes are additionally communicated to users.
privacy.legalNotice: This document requires legal review before public launch of the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern the use of the Jumix platform (hereinafter — the "Platform"), operated by Jumix LLP (hereinafter — the "Operator"). By registering on the Platform, you confirm your agreement with these terms.
terms.section1Body: The Operator provides Users with access to the Platform for managing crane equipment, work shifts, labor accounting and interaction between construction companies and crane operators.
terms.section2Body: The User undertakes to provide accurate data, not to share the account with third parties, not to use the Platform for purposes contrary to the legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan, and not to attempt to bypass the Platform's technical restrictions.
terms.section3Body: The Operator undertakes to ensure the Platform's operability, protection of personal data, and timely notification of changes. The Operator may restrict the User's access in case of violation of these Terms.
terms.section4Body: All rights to the Platform, its source code, design, content and trademarks belong to the Operator. The User is granted a limited non-exclusive license to use the Platform within the available functionality.
terms.section5Body: The Operator is not liable for User actions on the Platform, for the quality of services provided by third parties through the Platform, or for damages caused by the User's violation of these Terms. Settlements between companies and crane operators are the direct responsibility of the parties.
terms.section6Body: The Operator may unilaterally amend the Terms with notice to Users. The User may terminate the Terms at any time by deleting their account. The Operator may terminate the Terms in case of systematic violation of its provisions.
terms.section7Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan. Disputes are resolved in the manner established by law, at the location of the Operator.
terms.legalNotice: This document requires legal review before public launch of the platform.
